channel.title: Stockwatch - Key Events
channel.description: Real-time corporate announcements, deals, and financial results.

item.title: [NEOGEN] Neogen Chemicals: FY26 Audited Results Approved; Dividend Declared
item.description:
Neogen Chemicals Ltd's board approved the audited financial results (standalone and consolidated) for the quarter and financial year ended March 31, 2026. The board also recommended a final dividend of Re. 1 per equity share for FY26, subject to shareholder approval. Amendments to the insider trading code were approved, and details of outstanding qualified borrowings were disclosed. Neogen Ionics Limited, a wholly-owned subsidiary, reported changes in the project timeline and projected cost for its Dahej and Pakhajan projects.

  • Neogen Chemicals approved audited financial results for FY26 with an unmodified audit opinion.
  • A final dividend of Re. 1 per share was recommended for FY26, pending shareholder approval.
  • Insider trading code amendments were approved and uploaded to the company website.
  • Neogen Ionics' Dahej project cost is now ₹428 Cr with completion by Feb 2027.
  • Neogen Ionics' Pakhajan project cost is now ₹1,367 Cr with completion by Mar 2027.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Neogen Chemicals Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result

item.title: [RASRESOR] Ras Resorts Approves FY26 Audited Financial Results
item.description:
🔥 Trending

Ras Resorts & Apart Hotels Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial statements and results for the year and quarter ended March 31, 2026. The board also approved a delisting proposal, subject to shareholder and regulatory approvals, with a floor price of ₹43.73 per equity share and an indicative price of ₹56. The company will seek shareholder approval via postal ballot and e-voting.

  • Board approves audited financial statements for FY26.
  • Delisting proposal approved, pending shareholder and regulatory approvals.
  • Floor price for delisting offer set at ₹43.73 per share.
  • Indicative price for delisting offer is ₹56 per share.
  • Shareholder approval to be sought via postal ballot and e-voting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: RAS RESORTS & APART HOTELS LTD. | Category: Delisting

item.title: [OPCHAINS] O. P. Chains Board Meeting on May 20, 2026 to Approve Results
item.description:
O. P. Chains Ltd has scheduled a Board Meeting on May 20, 2026, to consider and approve the audited financial results for the half year and year ended March 31, 2026. The meeting will also cover the statement of assets and liabilities, cash flow statement, and auditor's reports for the same period. The trading window closure, effective from April 1, 2026, will also be discussed.

  • Board meeting scheduled for May 20, 2026, to approve financial results.
  • Audited financial results for the half year and year ended March 31, 2026, to be considered.
  • Trading window closed from April 1, 2026, until 48 hours after results declaration.
  • Re-appointment of Mr. Aman Parashar as internal auditor to be considered.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: O. P. Chains Ltd | Category: Board Meeting

item.title: [MAITHANALL] Maithan Alloys Appoints Senior Management Officers
item.description:
Maithan Alloys Ltd. has announced the appointment of Mr. B. Venugopal Rao, Senior General Manager (Operations), as a member of Senior Management (Plant Head of Visakhapatnam Unit) and the elevation of Mr. Amar Modi, DGM Commercial, as a member of Senior Management, both effective from May 16, 2026. The appointments were approved by the Board of Directors on May 15, 2026, following the recommendation of the Nomination and Remuneration Committee.

  • Mr. B. Venugopal Rao appointed as Senior Management member, effective May 16, 2026.
  • Mr. Amar Modi elevated to Senior Management, effective May 16, 2026.
  • Appointments approved by the Board on May 15, 2026.
  • Mr. Rao has 25 years of experience in ferro alloys production management.
  • Mr. Modi has over 18 years of experience in commercial activities.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: MAITHAN ALLOYS LTD. | Category: Management Change

item.title: [NEOGEN] Neogen Chemicals Recommends Final Dividend of ₹1 Per Share
item.description:
Neogen Chemicals Ltd's board has recommended a final dividend of Re. 1 per equity share for the financial year 2025-26, subject to shareholder approval at the upcoming 37th Annual General Meeting (AGM). The record date and AGM date will be announced later. The board also approved the audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and amendments to the insider trading code. Additionally, there's a change in project timeline and cost for Neogen Ionics Limited's Dahej and Pakhajan projects.

  • Neogen Chemicals recommends a final dividend of ₹1 per share for FY26.
  • Audited financial results for FY26 were approved with an unmodified audit opinion.
  • Insider trading code amendments approved and uploaded to the company website.
  • Dahej project timeline revised to Feb 2027, cost to ₹428 Crore.
  • Pakhajan project timeline revised to March 2027, cost to ₹1,367 Crore.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Neogen Chemicals Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [DELHIVERY] Delhivery Elevates Six Leaders to C-Suite
item.description:
Delhivery Ltd (NSE: DELHIVERY, BSE: 543529) announced the elevation of six senior leaders to C-Suite positions, effective immediately. The move aims to strengthen executive leadership and support the company's growth. The elevated leaders include Arun Bagavathi (COO - Network Operations), Prashant Gazipur (COO - In-city Operations), Nikhil Ummat (COO - Engineering and Automation), Sunny Raja (Chief Procurement Officer), Varun Bakshi (Chief Sales Officer), and Vikas Kapoor (Chief Strategy Officer).

  • Delhivery elevates six senior leaders to C-Suite positions.
  • Arun Bagavathi appointed COO - Network Operations.
  • Prashant Gazipur appointed COO - In-city Operations.
  • Nikhil Ummat appointed COO - Engineering and Automation.
  • Varun Bakshi appointed Chief Sales Officer.
  • Vikas Kapoor appointed Chief Strategy Officer.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Delhivery Ltd | Category: Management Change

item.title: [GUJGAS] Gujarat Gas Allots 62.27 Cr Equity Shares to GSPC, GSPL Shareholders
item.description:
Gujarat Gas Ltd's Board of Directors has approved the allotment of 62,27,14,719 equity shares to eligible shareholders of Gujarat State Petroleum Corporation (GSPC) and Gujarat State Petronet Limited (GSPL) as of the record date, May 12, 2026. This allotment is part of the Composite Scheme of Amalgamation and Arrangement. Specifically, 35,20,17,714 shares were allotted to GSPC shareholders and 27,06,97,005 shares to GSPL shareholders. The allotted shares will rank equally with existing equity shares. Fractional entitlements will be consolidated and allotted in dematerialized form to IDBI Trusteeship Services Limited, who will dispose of them and distribute the proceeds to eligible shareholders.

  • Gujarat Gas allots 62.27 crore equity shares to GSPC and GSPL shareholders.
  • Allotment is part of the Composite Scheme of Amalgamation and Arrangement.
  • GSPC shareholders receive 35.20 crore shares, GSPL shareholders receive 27.06 crore shares.
  • Allotted shares rank equally with existing equity shares of the company.
  • Fractional entitlements will be consolidated and distributed as per the scheme.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Gujarat Gas Ltd | Category: Corporate Action

item.title: [VALIANTORG] Valiant Organics Grants 19,500 Stock Options Under ESOP 2022
item.description:
Valiant Organics Ltd's Nomination and Remuneration Committee approved the grant of 19,500 employee stock options under the 'Valiant - Employees Stock Option Plan 2022' at an exercise price of ₹10 per option. Each option allows the holder to apply for one equity share of the company with a face value of ₹10. 15,000 options will vest after one year, with the remainder vesting upon achievement of specified performance criteria. The options are exercisable within three years from the vesting date.

  • Valiant Organics grants 19,500 stock options to eligible employees.
  • Exercise price is set at ₹10 per option.
  • Options vest over time, based on tenure and performance.
  • Each option converts to one equity share of ₹10 face value.
  • Options are exercisable within 3 years of vesting.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Valiant Organics Ltd | Category: ESOP

item.title: [NEOGEN] Neogen Chemicals: Final Dividend of Re. 1 Recommended
item.description:
Neogen Chemicals Ltd approved audited financial results for the year ended March 31, 2026, and recommended a final dividend of Re. 1 per equity share, subject to shareholder approval. The company also approved amendments to its insider trading code. Additionally, there's a change in project timeline and projected cost for the Dahej and Pakhajan Project of NIL, its wholly-owned subsidiary.

  • Neogen Chemicals approved audited financial results for FY26.
  • A final dividend of Re. 1 per share was recommended for FY26.
  • Amendments to the insider trading code were approved.
  • Dahej project cost revised to ₹428 Cr, completion by Feb 2027.
  • Pakhajan project cost revised to ₹1,367 Cr, completion by Mar 2027.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Neogen Chemicals Ltd | Category: Dividend

item.title: [SHILINDORE] Sayaji Hotels Audited Results for FY26 Approved
item.description:
Sayaji Hotels (Indore) Ltd's Board of Directors approved the audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026. The board also approved the appointment of M/s Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP and M/s Abhinav Khandelwal & Associates as Internal Auditors for different units for the Financial Year 2026-27. Additionally, the board approved an increase in borrowing limits, subject to shareholder approval.

  • Audited financial results for the quarter and year ended March 31, 2026, approved.
  • Deloitte Touche Tohmatsu India LLP appointed as Internal Auditor for Indore Unit.
  • Abhinav Khandelwal & Associates appointed as Internal Auditor for Corporate and Altara Unit.
  • Increase in borrowing limits approved, subject to shareholder approval.

📄 Read Official Filing (PDF)


Company: Sayaji Hotels (Indore) Ltd | Category: Quarterly Result
